query: What Dominion Energy commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Virginia?
final_answer: The highest demand charge is billed to Large General Service customers — e.g., Schedule 10 (Large General Service) / GS‑4 (Large General Service, primary). Under the filed Virginia tariff the first 5,000 kW of distribution demand is billed at $2.717/kW (additional kW at $2.076/kW).
